The correct path stops the prohibited branch, states the limitation, and gives the safest relevant next action or escalation. This boundary is materially more specific and reliable than generic caution. Supporting files DECISION-RECORD-FORMAT.md, PREMORTEM.md provide the task-specific format or guardrails.
